meaning: n.[医](血管、淋巴管、神经等的)丛
examples: So tell me: where exactly is the solar plexus?
This sound is connected to your solar plexus chakra and will increase heat into your stomach area.
Plexus Online is expected to bring continuity, flexibility and adaptability to Inteva's global operations.
"I'm feeling a heavy presence here, " says Ms. Breaux, placing a palm on her solar plexus.
That was quite a punch to the emotional solar plexus of an eight-year-old boy.
